recipes.title: Pasta Primavera
recipes.description: A light and colorful pasta dish loaded with fresh seasonal vegetables and tossed in a bright lemon-garlic olive oil sauce.
instructions: Boil a large pot of salted water and cook penne until al dente, about 10 minutes.
While pasta cooks, heat olive oil in a pan over medium heat and sauté minced garlic for 1 minute.
Add sliced zucchini and cherry tomatoes. Cook for 5 minutes until softened.
Drain pasta, reserving ½ cup of pasta water.
Toss pasta with vegetables, squeeze lemon juice, and add pasta water as needed.
Serve topped with grated parmesan and fresh basil.

recipes.title: Chicken Curry
recipes.description: A rich and aromatic Thai-inspired chicken curry simmered in creamy coconut milk with warming spices.
instructions: Cut chicken breast into bite-sized chunks and season with salt.
Heat oil in a large pan over medium-high heat. Sear chicken until golden, about 4 minutes. Set aside.
In the same pan, fry curry paste with minced garlic and ginger for 2 minutes until fragrant.
Pour in coconut milk and bring to a gentle simmer.
Return chicken to the pan. Add fish sauce and brown sugar. Simmer for 15 minutes.
Squeeze lime juice, garnish with fresh coriander, and serve with steamed rice.

recipes.title: Greek Salad
recipes.description: A crisp and refreshing classic Greek salad with briny olives, creamy feta, and a simple oregano dressing.
instructions: Chop tomatoes and cucumber into rough chunks.
Thinly slice red onion and add to a large bowl.
Add olives and toss everything with olive oil and red wine vinegar.
Season with salt, pepper, and dried oregano.
Top with a large block or crumbled feta cheese and serve immediately.

recipes.title: Fluffy Pancakes
recipes.description: Thick, golden, melt-in-your-mouth pancakes perfect for a lazy weekend breakfast.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together flour, baking powder, sugar, and salt.
In a separate bowl, beat eggs with milk, melted butter, and vanilla.
Pour wet ingredients into dry and stir until just combined — lumps are fine, do not overmix.
Heat a non-stick pan over medium heat and lightly grease with butter.
Pour ¼ cup batter per pancake. Cook until bubbles form on surface, about 2 minutes, then flip.
Cook another 1 minute until golden. Serve with maple syrup and fresh berries.

recipes.title: Lentil Soup
recipes.description: A hearty, warming red lentil soup spiced with cumin and turmeric — filling, nutritious, and entirely plant-based.
instructions: Heat olive oil in a large pot over medium heat. Sauté diced onion and carrot for 5 minutes.
Add minced garlic, cumin, and turmeric. Cook for 1 minute until fragrant.
Add rinsed lentils, canned tomatoes, and vegetable stock. Stir to combine.
Bring to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer for 25 minutes until lentils are soft.
Use an immersion blender to partially blend for a thick, creamy texture.
Stir in lemon juice, season with salt and pepper, and serve with crusty bread.

recipes.title: Garlic Mushroom Risotto
recipes.description: A creamy, restaurant-quality risotto packed with earthy mushrooms and finished with parmesan and fresh thyme.
instructions: Warm vegetable stock in a saucepan over low heat — keep it warm throughout.
Sauté sliced mushrooms in butter over high heat until golden. Set aside.
In the same pan, soften diced shallot and garlic over medium heat, about 3 minutes.
Add arborio rice and toast for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Pour in white wine and stir until absorbed.
Add warm stock one ladle at a time, stirring continuously and waiting for each ladle to absorb before adding the next — about 18 minutes total.
Stir in mushrooms, grated parmesan, and fresh thyme. Season and serve immediately.

recipes.title: Beef Tacos
recipes.description: Juicy seasoned ground beef in crispy taco shells topped with fresh salsa, sour cream, and melted cheese.
instructions: Brown ground beef in a pan over medium-high heat, breaking it apart as it cooks.
Drain excess fat, then add taco seasoning and ¼ cup water. Stir and simmer for 3 minutes.
Dice tomatoes and onion. Shred lettuce. Grate cheese.
Warm taco shells in oven at 180°C for 3 minutes.
Fill shells with beef, top with cheese, lettuce, tomato, and sour cream.
Squeeze lime juice over the top and serve immediately.

recipes.title: Avocado Toast
recipes.description: Creamy smashed avocado on toasted sourdough with poached eggs, chilli flakes, and a drizzle of olive oil.
instructions: Toast sourdough slices until golden and crispy.
Scoop avocado flesh into a bowl, add lemon juice, salt, and pepper. Mash with a fork.
Bring a pot of water to a gentle simmer. Add a splash of vinegar.
Crack each egg into a small bowl, then gently slide into the simmering water. Poach for 3 minutes.
Spread mashed avocado generously over toast.
Top with poached egg, chilli flakes, and a drizzle of olive oil. Serve immediately.

recipes.title: Mango Smoothie Bowl
recipes.description: A vibrant frozen mango smoothie bowl topped with granola, fresh berries, and coconut flakes for a refreshing breakfast.
instructions: Blend frozen mango, banana, and coconut milk until thick and smooth.
Pour into a bowl — the consistency should be thicker than a regular smoothie.
Top with granola, sliced strawberries, and blueberries.
Sprinkle coconut flakes and chia seeds over the top.
Serve immediately before it melts.

recipes.title: Salmon Teriyaki
recipes.description: Glazed salmon fillets in a sweet and savory homemade teriyaki sauce, served over steamed jasmine rice.
instructions: Mix soy sauce, honey, sesame oil, minced garlic, and grated ginger to make teriyaki sauce.
Marinate salmon in half the sauce for 15 minutes.
Cook jasmine rice according to package instructions.
Heat a non-stick pan over medium-high heat. Cook salmon skin-side down for 4 minutes.
Flip and pour remaining sauce over. Cook another 3 minutes until caramelized.
Serve over rice, garnished with sliced spring onions and sesame seeds.

recipes.title: Margherita Pizza
recipes.description: A classic Neapolitan pizza with a thin crispy base, rich tomato sauce, fresh mozzarella, and fragrant basil.
instructions: Preheat oven to 250°C with a pizza stone or baking tray inside.
Stretch pizza dough into a thin 30cm circle on a floured surface.
Rub crust with a cut garlic clove and drizzle with olive oil.
Spread tomato sauce evenly, leaving a 2cm border.
Tear mozzarella and scatter evenly over the sauce.
Bake for 8-10 minutes until crust is golden and cheese is bubbling.
Top with fresh basil leaves and a final drizzle of olive oil. Serve hot.

recipes.title: Vegetable Stir Fry
recipes.description: A quick and vibrant stir fry packed with crunchy vegetables in a savory ginger-soy sauce, served over noodles.
instructions: Cook noodles according to package instructions. Drain and set aside.
Mix soy sauce, sesame oil, minced garlic, and grated ginger in a small bowl.
Heat a wok or large pan over high heat until smoking.
Add vegetables in order of cooking time: carrots first, then broccoli, pepper, and snap peas.
Stir fry for 4-5 minutes keeping vegetables crisp.
Add noodles and sauce, toss everything together for 2 minutes.
Serve topped with sliced spring onions and a drizzle of sesame oil.

recipes.title: Shakshuka
recipes.description: Eggs poached in a rich, spiced tomato and pepper sauce — a Middle Eastern classic that works for any meal of the day.
instructions: Heat olive oil in a wide pan over medium heat. Sauté diced onion for 5 minutes.
Add sliced bell pepper and cook another 3 minutes.
Stir in minced garlic, cumin, paprika, and chilli flakes. Cook 1 minute.
Pour in canned tomatoes, crushing them with a spoon. Simmer 10 minutes.
Make 4 wells in the sauce and crack an egg into each.
Cover and cook on low heat for 5-7 minutes until whites are set but yolks are runny.
Garnish with fresh parsley and serve with crusty bread.

recipes.title: Caesar Salad
recipes.description: Crisp romaine lettuce with homemade Caesar dressing, crunchy croutons, and shaved parmesan — a timeless classic.
instructions: Tear sourdough into chunks and toss with olive oil and garlic. Bake at 180°C for 10 minutes until golden.
Season chicken breast and grill or pan-fry for 6 minutes each side. Slice thinly.
Whisk together lemon juice, mustard, Worcestershire sauce, anchovy paste, and olive oil for dressing.
Chop romaine into large pieces and add to a bowl.
Toss with dressing, croutons, and sliced chicken.
Finish with shaved parmesan and cracked black pepper.

recipes.title: Banana Oat Muffins
recipes.description: Moist, naturally sweetened banana oat muffins — perfect for meal prep and a healthy grab-and-go breakfast.
instructions: Preheat oven to 175°C. Line a muffin tin with paper cases.
Mash bananas thoroughly in a large bowl.
Add eggs, honey, melted coconut oil, and vanilla. Mix well.
Stir in rolled oats, baking powder, and cinnamon until combined.
Fold in roughly chopped walnuts.
Divide batter evenly into 6 muffin cases.
Bake for 20-22 minutes until a toothpick inserted comes out clean. Cool before serving.
